attacking_style: Targets early breakaways with intent to secure KOM points rather than stage victory. Opportunistic on categorized climbs within breakaways to maximize classification points.
team_tactics: Appears to operate with freedom to join early breaks for classification hunting rather than stage wins. Limited evidence of team setup or domestique support for personal ambitions.
terrain_preference: Multiple categorized climbs where KOM points can be accumulated from breakaways. Less suited to sustained, high-intensity efforts required in small, powerful breaks.
vulnerability: Lacks strength to survive in quality breakaways when pace intensifies or peloton chase accelerates. Cannot sustain long, hard efforts against stronger break companions.
key_patterns: Prioritizes KOM classification over stage wins when in breakaways (2 instances)
Joins early breaks but struggles to maintain position when intensity rises (2 instances)
Tactical focus on points gathering rather than sustaining break to finish
form_trajectory: neutral: Mixed results show consistent break-hunting approach but variable physical capacity to execute fully
